Shaymin

#0491 Darkrai #0493 Arceus
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Shaymin is a Grass type Pokémon introduced in Generation 4.

Land Forme Sky Forme

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0492
Type Grass
Species Gratitude Pokémon
Height 0.2 m (0′08″)
Weight 2.1 kg (4.6 lbs)
Abilities 1. Natural Cure
Local № 0241 (Legends: Arceus)

Training

EV yield 3 HP
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 100 (higher than normal)
Base Exp. 270
Growth Rate Medium Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Undiscovered
Gender Genderless
Egg cycles 120 (30,584–30,840 steps)

Evolution chart

  • Shaymin does not evolve.

Shaymin changes

  • In Generation 4, Shaymin (Sky Forme) has 3 HP EVs.
  • In Generation 4, Shaymin (Land Forme) has a base experience yield of 64.

Pokédex entries

Land Forme

Diamond It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant.
Pearl It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.
Platinum The flowers all over its body burst into bloom if it is lovingly hugged and senses gratitude.
HeartGold
SoulSilver		 The blooming of Gracidea flowers confers the power of flight upon it. Feelings of gratitude are the message it delivers.
Black
White
Black 2
White 2		 The flowers all over its body burst into bloom if it is lovingly hugged and senses gratitude.
X
Omega Ruby		 It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 The blooming of Gracidea flowers confers the power of flight upon it. Feelings of gratitude are the message it delivers.
Brilliant Diamond It lives in common flower patches but is rarely noticed. It is often mistaken for a flowering plant when curled up.
Shining Pearl It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.
Legends: Arceus When the turning of seasons brings the cruel winter to its end and the joyous people give thanks to the heavens, Shaymin appears and covers the withered land with flowers.

Sky Forme

Legends: Arceus Upon taking in the scent of a particular rare flower, Shaymin is enveloped in light, and its tiny body transforms. I took a whiff of the flower myself, but alas, my body remained unchanged.

Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Shaymin does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Shaymin cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Egg moves

Shaymin does not learn any moves by breeding in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet.
